summary: Completed testing of NASSAQ WebSocket Real-time Notifications feature. Backend: 8/8 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All WebSocket UI features verified working.
context_for_next_testing_agent: WebSocket Real-time Notifications fully implemented and working. Features verified: 1) WebSocket connection establishes after login (console shows ✅ WebSocket connected) 2) /api/ws/stats endpoint returns online users count 3) RealtimeNotificationIndicator component in sidebar with green connection dot 4) Notification dropdown with settings 5) Sound toggle working 6) Browser notification permission request button 7) WebSocket ping/pong keep-alive working 8) Connection properly rejected without token

admin_login.evidence: Admin login with admin@nassaq.com / Admin@123 successful

websocket_connection.evidence: Console shows '✅ WebSocket connected' after login

realtime_notification_indicator.evidence: Bell icon with data-testid='realtime-notifications-btn' visible in sidebar

connection_indicator.evidence: Green dot (bg-green-500) visible indicating WebSocket connected

notification_dropdown.evidence: Dropdown opens showing 'الإشعارات الفورية' header, online users count, settings

sound_toggle.evidence: Sound toggle (data-testid='sound-toggle') found and working in settings

browser_notification_permission.evidence: Browser notification enable button visible in settings panel

websocket_ping_pong.evidence: WebSocket ping/pong keep-alive mechanism working correctly

websocket_auth_rejection.evidence: WebSocket connection without token correctly rejected with error message
